zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Southwell於大約1548年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可武德利辛時，她的父親Sir Richard Southwell18歲，母親Bridget Copley14歲。她於1561年7月21日之前與Henry Paston結婚。她去世於1622年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾塔丁頓享年75歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾德拉可洛福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Southwell于大约1548年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可武德利辛时，她的父亲Sir Richard Southwell18岁，母亲Bridget Copley14岁。她于1561年7月21日之前与Henry Paston结婚。她去世于1622年在英国英格兰德比夏爾塔丁頓享年75岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾德拉可洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Southwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English south ‘south’ + wel(le) ‘well, pool, spring’ (Old English sūth + wella). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived ‘by the south well’ or ‘south of the well’, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Southwell (Nottinghamshire) or Southwell on the Isle of Portland (Dorset).
in Yorkshire and Lancashire, often a hypercorrect form of Soothill, a habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Southwell was born about 1548, in Woodrising, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Southwell, was 18 and her mother, Bridget Copley, was 14. She married Henry Paston before 21 July 1561. She died in 1622, in Taddington, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Southwell est née environ 1548, à Woodrising, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Southwell, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Bridget Copley, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Paston avant 21 juillet 1561. Elle est décédée en 1622, à Taddington, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Southwell um 1548 in Woodrising, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Southwell 18 und ihre Mutter Bridget Copley 14. Sie hat vor 21. Juli 1561 Henry Paston geheiratet. Sie starb 1622 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Taddington, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Southwell è nata il circa 1548 nel Woodrising, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Richard Southwell, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Bridget Copley, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Henry Paston prima del 21 luglio 1561. Morì nel 1622, nel Taddington, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Southwellが約1548年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウッドリシングで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Southwellは18歳，母Bridget Copleyは14歳であった。1561年7月21日以前にHenry Pastonと結婚した。彼女は1622年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアタッドイントンで75歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアドラケロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Southwell(이)가 대략 1548년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 우드리징에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Southwell(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bridget Copley(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1561년 7월 21일 이전 Henry Paston(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1622년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 타딩턴에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 드라켈로에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Southwell nasceu aproximadamente 1548, em Woodrising, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Southwell, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Bridget Copley, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Paston antes 21 de julho de 1561. Ela faleceu em 1622, em Taddington, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Southwell родилась около 1548 г. в местности вудрисинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Southwell было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Bridget Copley, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Paston перед 21 июля 1561 г. Она умерла в 1622 г. в местности таддингтон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности дрекелоу, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Southwell nació aproximadamente 1548, en Woodrising, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Southwell, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Bridget Copley, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Henry Paston antes de 21 de julio de 1561. Murió en 1622, en Taddington, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
